name: Walt Disney Co
summary: The Walt Disney Company is a diversified worldwide entertainment company operating in three segments: Entertainment, Sports, and Experiences. Entertainment includes linear TV networks (ABC, Disney, FX, National Geographic), direct-to-consumer streaming services (Disney+, Hulu), and content sales/licensing. Sports includes ESPN properties. The company produces and distributes film and episodic content globally, operates theme parks and resorts under Experiences, and licenses intellectual property across consumer products and live entertainment.

products.name: Disney+
products.description: Global DTC streaming service offering general entertainment, family, and sports programming.

products.name: Hulu
products.description: U.S. DTC streaming service offering general entertainment and live TV (vMVPD) programming.

products.name: ABC Network
products.description: National broadcast television network distributing to approximately 245 affiliated stations plus 8 owned stations.

products.name: Disney Channels
products.description: Branded TV channels (Disney Channel, Disney Junior, Disney XD) targeting kids ages 2-14.

products.name: Freeform
products.description: Cable TV channel targeting viewers ages 18-34 with original and licensed series and films.

products.name: FX Channels
products.description: Branded TV channels (FX, FXM, FXX) airing original and licensed television series and films.

products.name: National Geographic Channels
products.description: Branded channels airing travel, wildlife, documentary, science and history programming.

products.name: Hulu Live TV
products.description: Virtual multi-channel video programming distributor (vMVPD) offering live linear streams of cable and broadcast networks.

products.name: Industrial Light & Magic
products.description: Post-production visual effects services provided to film and entertainment productions.

products.name: Skywalker Sound
products.description: Post-production audio services for film and entertainment productions.

partnerships.description: 50% equity investment in A+E Global Media (formerly A+E Television Networks), which develops and distributes content globally.
30% ownership interest in Tata Play Limited, operating a direct-to-home satellite distribution platform in India.
Used for subscriber and television household estimates for domestic networks and stations.
ESPN programs the sports daypart on ABC Network (branded ESPN on ABC) and provides sports content to Disney+ and Hulu.
